releases.title: Grow & retain
items: Announcements — email and text all your students, a group, or one class at once
Referral program — share your link; you and a fellow teacher each get a free month
More coming: attendance insights and lesson packages

releases.title: Run your day
items: Automated event reminders — students get an email and text before every session
Upcoming sessions on your dashboard, with one-tap attendance check-off
Export your students and leads to a spreadsheet anytime
New annual plan — two months free

releases.title: Made yours
items: Fresh Charleston look and logo across the whole app
Your booking and inquiry links now show your studio's own logo and name
Reminders and confirmations are branded to your studio
Mobile menu and a smoother, cleaner sign-in

releases.title: Charleston launches
items: Your own booking page, inquiry form, and shareable public card
Students, leads, scheduling, waitlists and payments — all in one place
A private, secure studio: your data is yours alone
